title: Toilet Time Potty Putter Set – Hilarious Mini Golf Game for Bathroom | Funny Gag Gift for Men, Golf Lovers & Office Parties | Toilet Game with Club, Balls, Green Mat & Flag HTUK
features: Turn your bathroom breaks into tee time with the HTUK Toilet Time Potty Putter Set – the ultimate gag gift for golfers and anyone who loves a laugh! This mini golf game lets you practice your putting skills while sitting on the throne. Easy to set up and loads of fun, it’s the perfect novelty item for home bathrooms, offices, or as a funny gift for friends and family.

Each set includes everything you need for a quick round — a putting green mat that fits neatly around your toilet, a mini golf club, two golf balls, a cup with flag, and a hilarious “Do Not Disturb – Golf Game in Progress” door sign. Whether you’re buying for Father’s Day, a birthday, Secret Santa, or just to get a laugh, this HTUK Toilet Golf Game delivers endless fun and laughter!
Set up is simple, easy and fast. This is a great way to handle your game and improve your batting skills! The perfect game for golf lovers.

⛳ Bathroom Fun: Turn any toilet break into a mini putting session! 😂 Great Gag Gift: Perfect for golfers, dads, colleagues, or anyone with a sense of humour. 🏠 Easy Setup: The green mat fits neatly around the toilet base – ready in seconds.

🎯 Complete Set: Includes putting green mat, mini golf club, 2 golf balls, flag with cup, and a “Do Not Disturb” door hanger. 🎁 Perfect Gift Idea: Ideal for birthdays, Christmas, Father’s Day, and office Secret Santa exchanges.
Includes: 1 × Putting green mat, 1 × Mini golf club, 2 × Golf balls, 1 × Flag and cup, 1 × Door hanger sign, Material: Plastic and fabric
